name: Hartz Cattraction Silver Vine & Catnip Plush Macaron Mice Cat Toy, 2 count
description: Entice your pretty kitty to play with Cattraction Silver Vine & Catnip Plush Macaron Mice Cat Toys from Hartz. This pair of plush pastry macaron mice come in pastel colors with jingly bells and expressive features to intrigue your furry friend. They are filled with a potent combination of silver vine and catnip attractants to grab your paw-tner’s attention and enhance her playtime. These toys are also light enough for your companion to carry, swat and bat for hours of enjoyment. Hartz Cattraction Silver Vine & Catnip Plush Macaron Mice Cat Toys stimulate your sidekick’s natural instincts to fulfill her need to play.
